name: Crisp Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add sugar to shortening and cream together until fluffy.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
3. Add cream and flavorings.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Mix dry ingredients into the creamed mixture well.
6. Chill dough for about 30 minutes.
7. Roll out small portions of dough on lightly floured surface or board.
8. Cut shapes using cookie cutters.
9. Place cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
10. Sprinkle additional granulated or colored sugar over cookies.
11. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 6 to 9 minutes, until golden brown.
12. Makes approximately 6 dozen medium-sized cookies.
